2. Another defensive gem

items.title: Aliyah Boston gets it in the paint from about 15 feet out but can't finish at the buzzer. Fever fall in Golden State 90-88. Fun back and forth game, but the Fever made too many mistakes — just 14 first-quarter points, some ugly runs, and a 9/28 night from deep. They're 4-3.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Aliyah Boston gets it in the paint from about 15 feet out but can't finish at the buzzer. Fever fall in Golden State 90-88. Fun back and forth game, but the Fever made too many mistakes — just 14 first-quarter points, some ugly runs, and a 9/28 night from deep. They're 4-3.

items.title: Becky Hammon: "I'm f---ing tired of that bulls--t. ... when Awak Kuier shoots more free throws than A'ja Wilson and Jackie Young and Chennedy Carter all combined, that's a problem.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Becky Hammon: "I'm f---ing tired of that bulls--t. ... when Awak Kuier shoots more free throws than A'ja Wilson and Jackie Young and Chennedy Carter all combined, that's a problem.

"We're not getting the same whistle. Give me my fine."

www.espn.com/wnba/story/_...

media.title: Hammon calls out refs, 'tired' of Aces' free throw disparity
media.description: Aces coach Becky Hammon blasted the officiating in Thursday's 95-87 loss to the Wings, saying that A'ja Wilson, Chennedy Carter and Jackie Young combining for one free throw attempt was a result of "not getting the same whistle."

items.title: 🏆 THURSDAY'S FINAL SCORES 🏆
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
🏆 THURSDAY'S FINAL SCORES 🏆

Victor Wembanyama STUFFS the stat sheet as the Spurs
force a WINNER-TAKE-ALL Game 7 in the NBA Conference Finals presented by Google!

Dylan Harper: 18 PTS (6-9 FGM), 6 REB
Stephon Castle: 17 PTS (5-10 FGM), 9 AST

Game 7: Saturday, 8:00pm/et, NBC and Peacock

items.title: “48 minutes away from the Finals, man… Something we've been dreaming about since we were little kids."
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
“48 minutes away from the Finals, man… Something we've been dreaming about since we were little kids."

Stephon Castle and the Spurs force a WINNER-TAKE-ALL Game 7 in OKC on Saturday night at 8pm/et on NBC/Peacock!

items.title: Harper on what he heard from Spurs family after Game 5:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Harper on what he heard from Spurs family after Game 5:

"People pulled me inside, just kept instilling confidence in me, trying to tell me to just go out there and be me, be in attack mode at all times. I think I went out there and did that today."

items.title: Spurs worked hard to get Harper in right mindset after Game 5:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs worked hard to get Harper in right mindset after Game 5: 

"When he's switched on mentally and aggressive, he's pretty damn good," Mitch said. "He's got all the talent in the world, makeup to do whatever he wants. He's capable of those nights when he's in the right place between the ears."
